title: Ability to Sort Boards
excerpt: We have many boards (one for each project we manage) and the list is growing all the time.  We would like to be able to sort the boards alphabetically to make them easier to find.  Currently it appears that the boards ar…

posts.author: tkageals (Todd Kageals)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have many boards (one for each project we manage) and the list is growing all the time. We would like to be able to sort the boards alphabetically to make them easier to find. Currently it appears that the boards are in the order of creation. We would like to have sort options.

Thanks for the consideration!

posts.author: DanIngham-IOI (Dan Ingham IOI / BPX)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @tkageals
Welcome to the community

If you have your boards in a workspace you can order the workspace alphabetically
Hope this is what you are meaning
Many thanks Dan

posts.author: garonrowland (Garon Rowland)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t see this in our enterprise account. Does it still exist?

posts.author: DanIngham-IOI (Dan Ingham IOI / BPX)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @garonrowland
Welcome to the community
On double checking it appears that i can see it on some of my workspaces but not all
I will check as to why, it might be that option is only available with certain products
Many Thanks Dan

posts.author: Billy (Billy Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like the ability to set default sort orders for boards on a workspace. I have a ton of boards and I need to be able to sort them Alphabetically and by Date Created!

posts.author: Hannah_Albert (Hannah Albert)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed - is this in the works. This is something my team is asking for as well.

posts.author: jfox24 (Jordin Fox)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! This is something that would be helpful when looking to sort alphabetically to keep different boards for same clients together, the drag and drop component that’s currently active is fine but having to manually organize everything takes up so much time

posts.author: BaileyW (Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: I desperately need the boards be able to be ordered alphabetically. I would like to use Monday for my company that holds 300+ events a year and so far it is perfect but not having the ability to automatically arrange the events in alphabetical order (by date) is going to be a major deciding factor on if I continue after the trial or use another option.

posts.author: NJE44 (Elizabeth K Coccia)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to sort boards within a folder in alpha order

posts.author: NJE44 (Elizabeth K Coccia)
posts.cookedHtml: I 10000000% agree with this! Has there be any progress on this feature?

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Bailey! Shannon here with the monday team. Thank you for submitting your feature request! To ensure that votes are accurately counted, I’ve merged your request with this existing one to combine the number of votes. Your request had 1 vote before the merge. Todd has the same request to alphabetize boards in a workspace–the vote count is now at 11!
